evals.prompt: I want to set up context so I don't have to repeat myself every time I ask for marketing help.
evals.expected_output: Should check for existing .agents/product-marketing-context.md first. If not found, should offer two paths: auto-draft from codebase or build from scratch. Should explain what the context document is and why it helps. Should begin gathering information conversationally, starting with product overview.
assertions: Explains the purpose of the document

evals.prompt: Update my ICP — we're now targeting mid-market companies instead of startups.
evals.expected_output: Should read the existing context file first. Should identify the Target Audience section and update it based on the new ICP. Should ask clarifying questions about what changed specifically. Should not overwrite unrelated sections.
assertions: Focuses update on Target Audience section
